comments.body:
> please merge as appropriate.

Okay will do.  I have parallel PRs open for buildah and podman.  I may defer merging this until those pass cleanly simply so we're using consistent images across the board.
@cevich This was merged in Buildah, don't see a PR against Podman?
The podman one is https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10829 and is totally FUBAR (I haven't looked into it yet).
